name: voice-profile-runtime-preflight
description: Reusable fragment: verify the voice runtime bridge is ready and the promoted runtime profile directory exists before a cloned-voice speak flow.

context.preflight_cmd: test -d active/shared/runtime/voice-profiles/{{profile_id}} && find active/shared/runtime/voice-profiles/{{profile_id}} -maxdepth 1 -type f | grep -q . && echo ok
